claim: In OSAI Prep Studio the grader component (ChallengeValidator in validator.py) owns two-signal grading; the tutor is retrieval-first and citation-enforced and never owns grading.
support: The **grader** owns verdicts: `ChallengeValidator` in `validator.py` performs two-signal grading.

claim: A learner passes a lab only when both Signal A (the reused detector fires on the attack transcript) and Signal B (the attack produced an evidence token) hold; agentic labs add Signal C, a causal-chain check.
support: A learner passes a lab only when **both** signals hold: **Signal A** is that the reused detector fires on the attack transcript
